results.title: Pegasus Airlines Resumes Scheduled Flights Between Sofia and Istanbul
results.description: Pegasus Airlines is set to recommence its scheduled flights between Sofia and Istanbul, marking a significant milestone in air travel connectivity between Bulgaria and Turkey. The anticipated relaunch is scheduled for May 1, as reported by the news outlet TravelNews. Passengers traveling between these two bustling metropolises will have the convenience of flights departing and arriving at the Sabiha Gokcen International Airport in Istanbul....
